title: Hi all. I wish to report a potential firmware bug with 1.14.1

messages.author: Strangetown
messages.text: I have a Heltec T114 flashed with companion Bluetooth and I decided to upgrade from 1.14.0 to 1.14.1 Device would then only remain powered up when plugged into USB. Downgraded to 1.14.0 and all seems to be fine again.
messages.content_html: I have a Heltec T114 flashed with companion Bluetooth and I decided to upgrade from 1.14.0 to 1.14.1 Device would then only remain powered up when plugged into USB. Downgraded to 1.14.0 and all seems to be fine again.
